headline: Owner & Producer at Finca Miles | Single-Estate Picual & Hojiblanca EVOO | Certified Olive Oil Sommelier | Export to DE/UK/CH
summary: Owner of Finca Miles, a 35-hectare single-estate Picual and Hojiblanca olive grove in the Subbética, near Baena. Certified Olive Oil Sommelier focused on quality over volume, organic transition, and direct relationships with export buyers in Germany, the UK, and Switzerland. Member of Cooperativa Oleícola Sierra Morena. Stewardship over profit.
